name: Paris
description: Based on one of the world's oldest weapon designs, this Tenno-crafted weapon can be used both in stealth and in open combat. The Paris uses a chargeable magnetic field to launch arrows capable of impaling enemies to walls.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Based on one of the world's oldest weapon designs, this Tenno-crafted weapon can be used both in stealth and in open combat. The Paris uses a chargeable magnetic field to launch arrows capable of impaling enemies to walls.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
MK1-Paris
Paris
Paris Prime

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Paris Prime’s emissive colors not applying to the bow. As reported here: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/kvnu75/paris_prime_holes_dont_light_up_properly_instead/

patchlogs.name: Orphix Venom: Hotfix 29.6.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Paris Prime shot sounds occasionally playing locally for remote players.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Paris bow 3D draw sound not cutting off when bow is fully drawn.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.changes: Paris Prime:

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the hit FX of the Cernos Prime and Paris Prime.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Paris Prime arrow using incorrect textures.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.changes: When tracking down a bug why Paris Bows were doing less Damage than their Arsenal stats indicated, internal stats were reporting all Bows doing more damage than they actually were. Below is a review of all Bows (with the exception of the Lenz) and increased stats where appropriate:

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Made some adjustments to a few arm Armour pieces on the Nyx Paristhea Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ballistica (Prime/Rakta), Cernos (Prime), Daikyu, Dread, and Paris Prime Energy color persisting as default on the strings.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.changes: Improved volume of the new firing sounds introduced in Update 19.10.0 in different environments for the Braton, Braton MK1, Lato, and Paris.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.11.0+19.11.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Further minor firing sound improvement tweaks to the Braton, Lato and Paris.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Optimized remastered Braton, Lato and Paris firing sounds for lower frame rates.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Paris/Paris Prime kills not counting towards the ‘Rifleman’ challenge.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Paris Prime having many incorrect stats in the Arsenal, including a Critical Chance of 25% vs the expected 45%.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect materials on Paris Prime and Lex Prime attachments.

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Update 2
patchlogs.changes: Lex Prime, Paris Prime, Dakra Prime, Sicarus Prime, and Ankyros Prime have received the PBR treatment!

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Paris series ammo pool reduced to 20 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.6
patchlogs.fixes:
MK1 Paris charged shot flight speed has been increased by 35% in Conclave.
Paris, Paris Prime, and Cernos series charged shot flight speed has been increased 50% in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes:
Paris, Paris Prime and Cernos damage has been adjusted to two charged shot kill against the highest base EHP with +EHP mods in Conclave.
Mk1 Paris damage has been adjusted to two charged and one quick shot kill against the highest base EHP with +EHP mods in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Charged projectile speed increased for Paris, Paris Prime, Daikyu and Cernos in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.5
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Mk-1 Paris’ quick shot in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Paris Prime and Diakyu sitting strangely on some Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Reap havoc with the Anku! This full-sized Tenno scythe's design is inspired by the Paris Bow and is just as deadly.
Fixed the Paris Prime showing covering up menu options.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the draw radius and shot radius on Paris, Paris Prime, Cernos, and Daikyu. Before, players were able to hear you draw your bow from considerably far away distances that would give away your position.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Reduced the damage of all Paris bows in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.2
patchlogs.changes: ·         Reduced the damage of Paris Prime in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.14.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed MK1 Paris being sold in the Market for Platinum.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.5 + Survival Psa
patchlogs.changes: We noticed this when the UI said one thing (Forma), then we ended up with something else in the end-of-mission screen (Paris Prime Lower Limb).

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes: Rebalanced the MK1 Paris easier to use with comparable damage to the MK1 Braton.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.4.0
patchlogs.changes: A one-handed crossbow featuring a unique dual-firing mechanism, the Ballistica allows you to choose between a four bolt volley or a deadly accurate charged shot. As it is a secondary weapon, the Ballistica can be paired with the Paris compound bow for a lethal load out. Take aim and pin your enemy to the wall!

patchlogs.name: Update 9.8
patchlogs.changes: Paris Prime texture improvements.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Paris Prime blueprint not having icon or saving to inventory.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.changes: Stalker Bow and Paris 3D draw sounds now have fire rate multiplier.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
patchlogs.fixes:
Reworked Paris firing sound. No more musical notes. Added dedicated 2D and 3D sounds.
Fixed Paris not appearing in player profile stats page
Fixed Paris not auto-switching to pistol when out of ammo.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Paris and Boar sounds that were not consistent between what the user hears and what the other players hear.
Thunderbolt [Paris]: Chance for arrows to explode.
Fixed Paris unable to pick up ammo on clients.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Dagger Axe blueprint being incorrectly linked to Paris

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7.3: Level Expansions And New Weapons!
patchlogs.fixes:
Quiver and arrows for the Paris now properly apply colour customization
Fixed charged Paris shot that would be spent without the player releasing the shot

patchlogs.name: Update 7.5: Easter And Hotfixes!
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a functionality loss for Clients attempting to swap weapons while charging a shot for the Paris.
